channel.title: Lineageos on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Lineageos on My Linux Journey

item.title: Install Google Apps on LineageOS - GApps Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to installing Google Apps on LineageOS after flashing custom ROM. Covers GApps packages, recovery flashing, and post-install configuration.
